page_metadata.biotools__summary: Impute and phase genotype data in populations with pedigree information available. The program uses segregation analysis and haplotype library imputation to impute alleles and genotypes.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Impute and phase genotype data in populations with pedigree information available. The program uses segregation analysis and haplotype library imputation to impute alleles and genotypes.
